testsuite.name: Alif SDIO WiFi Zperf Test Suite
testsuite.details:
WiFi Zperf Test Suite for the Alif AIROC CYW55500 SDIO/WiFi driver. Tests WiFi connectivity, DHCP, TCP/UDP throughput via zperf, stability, and negative cases (unreachable server, zero-duration upload).
Target boards: Alif E8 AppKit (ae822fa0e5597xx0/rtss_hp). Preconditions: - WiFi AP running with SSID/PSK matching Kconfig defaults. - iperf server running on WIFI_ZPERF_SERVER_IP:WIFI_ZPERF_SERVER_PORT (default 10.0.0.76:5001) with firewall allowing TCP/UDP inbound.

testcase.name: test_wifi_connect
testcase.summary: REQ-ZPERF-001: Verify WiFi is connected and DHCP IP acquired in suite setup.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi driver initialized (firmware loaded, interface up). 2. Configured AP reachable.

step.actions: Suite setup waits for interface up, then calls wifi_connect() with configured SSID/PSK.
step.expectedresults: Connect succeeds, state is WIFI_STATE_COMPLETED.
DHCP lease acquired within 15 seconds. IPv4 unicast address is non-zero.

step.actions: Test verifies iface state and IPv4 config.
step.expectedresults: State == WIFI_STATE_COMPLETED, IPv4 config non-null, IP address non-zero.

testcase.requirement: REQ-ZPERF-001: WiFi connection and DHCP must succeed before throughput tests

testcase.name: test_tcp_upload
testcase.summary: REQ-ZPERF-002: Verify TCP upload throughput meets minimum threshold.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi connected, DHCP acquired. 2. iperf TCP server listening on configured IP:port.

step.actions: Configure upload params: pkt_size=WIFI_ZPERF_TCP_PACKET_SIZE (256), rate=0 (unlimited), duration=10s.
step.expectedresults: Params struct populated correctly.
Returns 0. If server unreachable, test skips gracefully.
Throughput >= WIFI_ZPERF_MIN_TCP_THROUGHPUT_KBPS (default 5000 kbps).

testcase.requirement: REQ-ZPERF-002: TCP upload throughput must meet minimum threshold

testcase.name: test_tcp_upload_large_packet
testcase.summary: REQ-ZPERF-003: Verify TCP upload with 1024-byte packets meets throughput threshold.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi connected, DHCP acquired. 2. iperf TCP server listening.

step.actions: Configure upload params: pkt_size=1024, rate=0, duration=10s.
step.expectedresults: Params struct populated correctly.
Returns 0, or skips if server unreachable.
Throughput >= WIFI_ZPERF_MIN_TCP_THROUGHPUT_KBPS.

testcase.requirement: REQ-ZPERF-003: TCP upload with 1024-byte packets must meet throughput

testcase.name: test_udp_upload
testcase.summary: REQ-ZPERF-004: Verify UDP upload throughput meets minimum threshold.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi connected, DHCP acquired. 2. iperf UDP server listening on configured IP:port.

step.actions: Configure upload params: pkt_size=256, rate=10000 kbps, duration=10s.
step.expectedresults: Params struct populated correctly.
Returns 0. If server unreachable, test skips gracefully.
Throughput >= WIFI_ZPERF_MIN_UDP_THROUGHPUT_KBPS (default 3000 kbps).

testcase.requirement: REQ-ZPERF-004: UDP upload throughput must meet minimum threshold

testcase.name: test_udp_upload_large_packet
testcase.summary: REQ-ZPERF-005: Verify UDP upload with 1024-byte packets meets throughput threshold.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi connected, DHCP acquired. 2. iperf UDP server listening.

step.actions: Configure upload params: pkt_size=1024, rate=10000 kbps, duration=10s.
step.expectedresults: Params struct populated correctly.
Returns 0, or skips if server unreachable.
Throughput >= WIFI_ZPERF_MIN_UDP_THROUGHPUT_KBPS.

testcase.requirement: REQ-ZPERF-005: UDP upload with 1024-byte packets must meet throughput

testcase.name: test_tcp_throughput_stability
testcase.summary: REQ-ZPERF-006: Verify TCP throughput stability across multiple runs.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi connected, DHCP acquired. 2. iperf TCP server listening.

step.expectedresults: Each run returns 0, or test skips on first unreachable.

step.actions: Record throughput for each run; compute avg, min, max.
step.expectedresults: Avg throughput >= WIFI_ZPERF_MIN_TCP_THROUGHPUT_KBPS. Min throughput >= half of threshold.

testcase.requirement: REQ-ZPERF-006: TCP throughput must remain stable across consecutive runs

testcase.name: test_udp_packet_loss
testcase.summary: REQ-ZPERF-007: Verify UDP packet loss is within acceptable bounds.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi connected, DHCP acquired. 2. iperf UDP server listening.

step.actions: Run zperf_udp_upload() with standard params (pkt=256, rate=10000 kbps, 10s).
step.expectedresults: Returns 0. If server unreachable, test skips.
If loss_pct > 100 (server report corrupted), test skips. Otherwise loss_pct <= 30%.

testcase.requirement: REQ-ZPERF-007: UDP packet loss must not exceed 30%

testcase.name: test_tcp_upload_invalid_server
testcase.summary: REQ-ZPERF-008: Negative test – TCP upload to unreachable server must not transfer data.

step.actions: Set params to unreachable IP (192.168.255.254:59999), pkt=256, duration=5s.
step.expectedresults: Params populated correctly.
Returns error (e.g., -116 ETIMEDOUT), or returns 0 with results.total_len == 0.

testcase.requirement: REQ-ZPERF-008: TCP upload to unreachable server must fail or transfer zero bytes

testcase.name: test_udp_upload_zero_duration
testcase.summary: REQ-ZPERF-009: Negative test – UDP upload with zero duration completes immediately.

step.actions: Set standard UDP params but duration_ms = 0.
step.expectedresults: Params populated correctly.
Completes immediately with minimal or zero packets sent. No hang.

testcase.requirement: REQ-ZPERF-009: Zero-duration UDP upload must complete without hang

testcase.name: test_wifi_disconnect
testcase.summary: REQ-ZPERF-010: Verify WiFi disconnect at end of suite succeeds.

step.expectedresults: Returns 0.
Event received with status 0 within timeout.

step.actions: If not connected at start, test skips gracefully.
step.expectedresults: ztest_test_skip() called; no hard failure.

testcase.requirement: REQ-ZPERF-010: Suite teardown disconnect must succeed or skip gracefully
